title: Agent 标记功能完成但实际未通过端到端测试
title_en: Agent Marks Features Done Without End-to-End Testing

body.problem: Agent 习惯于用单元测试或 curl 命令验证功能，认为通过即完成。但这些测试不能覆盖真实用户路径——功能在 UI 层面可能根本不工作，agent 却已标记为通过。
body.solution: 在 prompt 中明确要求使用浏览器自动化工具（如 Puppeteer MCP）进行测试，模拟真实用户的每一步操作。只有端到端流程跑通，才允许将功能标记为 passes: true。
body.keyTakeaway: "像用户一样测试"不是建议，是必要条件。agent 的测试本能是"技术层面能跑"，而不是"用户实际能用"，需要 prompt 层面明确纠正。

body_en.problem: Agents naturally reach for unit tests or curl commands to validate features. These pass even when the feature is broken at the UI level. The agent marks it done, but a real user would immediately see it fail.
body_en.solution: Explicitly instruct the agent to use browser automation tools (e.g., Puppeteer MCP server) and simulate every step a real user would take. Only after the full end-to-end flow succeeds can the feature be marked passes: true.
body_en.keyTakeaway: "Test like a user" must be an explicit requirement, not a suggestion. Agents default to technical validation (does the code run?) rather than user validation (does the feature work?). Prompting must correct this directly.
